3080020.name: ETO
3080020.description:
Form your platoon and take control in this WW2 tabletop turn-base strategy game. Defeat the enemy using tactics and luck and clear the stages with various puzzles and objectives.

In this game you will control a WW2 infantry platoon with its man in charge captain Williams. Some challenges will have a set pieces of units while others will have you composite your own platoon and figure out the best way to clear a stage. The game requires you to clear a stage and keep the captain alive while also adding a luck factor on top of a tabletop game by introducing dice roll tables.



Gameplay: You control 5 types of units - Captain, Private, Sniper, Medic and Mortar support. Each unit has a specific set of abilities that you need to utilize in order to clear a map. All units have 2 ability points per turn and various move distance, ranges and special abilities.
The traditional attrition system is replaced with dice rolls and various statuses that disables units prompting various tactic when managing the battlefield mixed with luck factor of a dice.
Game is played on a grid like map where you manage your troops around obstacles and covers where you use said terrain to gain advantage on a roll table, cover your troops with smoke and call air strikes.
Every game is a new experience when you balance strategy with luck!



Game features various levels with increasing difficulty and challenge modes both with in game star collection witch makes this game perfect casual single player couch time sink.
3080020.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
